---
# =============================================================================
# about.qmd — About page
# =============================================================================
#
# HOW TO EDIT THIS PAGE
# ---------------------
# • Change the `image` field to update the profile photo.
#   Place the image in the images/ folder and adjust the path accordingly.
# • Edit the `links` list to add or remove social/professional links.
# • The text below the YAML front matter is the page body — edit it freely.
# • Quarto's built-in `about` template supports several layouts:
#   jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
#   Change `template: trestles` to try a different layout.
#
# =============================================================================
title: "About Jules G Org"
image: images/lupin.png     # Replace with your own photo (400×400 px recommended)
about:
  template: trestles          # Try: jolla | solana | marquee | broadside
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/julesg-org
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter / X
      href: https://twitter.com/julesg_org
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:hello@julesg-org.example.com
---

## Who We Are

**Jules G Org** is an open-source organisation focused on data science,
software engineering, and making technical knowledge more accessible.

We publish reproducible analyses, reusable tooling, and detailed write-ups on
everything from exploratory data analysis to deployment pipelines.

## What We Do

- 📊 **Data Science** — reproducible notebooks, statistical analyses, and
  visualisation libraries.
- 🛠️ **Open-Source Tools** — small, focused packages and utilities available
  on GitHub.
- ✍️ **Technical Writing** — in-depth blog posts and tutorials that walk
  through real problems step by step.

## How This Site Works

This site is built with **[Quarto](https://quarto.org)** and deployed
automatically to **GitHub Pages** via a GitHub Actions workflow every time
changes are pushed to the `main` branch.

Each project in the `julesg-org` GitHub organisation can contribute its own
page here by following the pattern demonstrated in
[projects/sample-project](projects/sample-project/index.qmd).

## Get Involved

We welcome contributions!  Open an issue or pull request on any of our
repositories, or reach out via the links above.
